poll-orchestrator.description: Orchestrates the entire LinkedIn poll generation workflow, coordinating specialized agents

poll-researcher.description: Researches real-world use cases and incidents for LinkedIn polls using web search

poll-generator.description: Generates debate-driven LinkedIn poll questions and options based on research

poll-reviewer.description: Reviews generated polls for quality, engagement potential, and LinkedIn best practices

poll-poster.description: Handles LinkedIn posting logistics, template selection, and hashtag strategy
